name: WeThrive
description: Create high-performance teams by motivating, engaging, aligning and retaining your talent with WeThrive. Learn more about WeThrive

reviews.review_title: Creating concrete results within teams with a more comprehensive take on well-being and motivation
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Can't recommend this product enough. I manage a healthcare team with 7 employees. Uncovered issues within my team which I was not aware of. It identified issues and provided in depth analysis of a wide range of factors affecting team performance including social and psychological as well as skills and knowledge. Team loved it. It has literally revolutionized the way we work as a team and given us a very tangible way of solving issues and developing people.

reviews.review_title: WeThrive Employee Engagement Survey
reviews.review_description: We have really valued the opportunity to gain feedback from staff and to track employee engagement to help us give our employees a voice and to help us improve as an organisation and responsible employer. Personalised recommendations are really valuable and survey results are clearly displayed - the heatmaps in particular show us at a glance where we are doing well and where we have opportunity for improvement.
reviews.review_pros: We have used WeThrive to assist us with employee engagement surveys since 2019. Integration was easy and the team at WeThrive could not be more helpful if any questions come up or we need assistance - they are always quick to respond and happy to help with anything we need. Staff find WeThrive surveys easy to use and managers have said they particularly like the personalised recommendations and ideas for actions for their teams as it helps them when drawing up action plans following survey results. We plan to try to use more features that WeThrive offer going forwards.
reviews.review_cons: There are no cons that I can think of - we're very happy with WeThrive.

reviews.review_title: WeThrive Review
reviews.review_description: Really good experience, first time doing a full survey with the team and it went well. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] is great and has helped us conduct a temporary Covid19 pulse survey to see how the team is doing right now.
reviews.review_pros: The support from our brilliant account manager has allowed us to develop actions from our engagement survey. The clear graphs and additional questions sets it above competitors.
reviews.review_cons: It's not the easiest to understand when trying to view certain team results for example but once explained it was easier. UX could be reviewed.

reviews.review_title: Amazing employee engagement tool
reviews.review_description: Amazing - the Customer Service team is extremely helpful and personable. They come back extremely quickly and have always answered my questions.
reviews.review_pros: WeThrive is an easy-to-use tool that really helps you understand what is going on in all organisations. It provides comprehensive data - for many of my clients we have used this information to help make informed decisions on People Strategy. The curated content based on the survey results is also a huge benefit - it offers tailored learning for all employees and managers.
reviews.review_cons: There have been a few changes in my time using the product - this can something be a little bit confusing but once you get your head around it, it is very easy to use. The changes are also a big plus and makes the functionality of the software extremely wide-ranging.

reviews.review_title: A brilliant platform to enhance individual and company performance
reviews.review_description: We are all aware that engaged employees are 21% more productive than their less engaged co-workers. The psychological contract that we have with our employees has taken a huge shift. Willis Insurance & Risk Management have partnered with "wethrive" to offer a product that is really professional, adaptable and that delivers results to enhance performance. Our clients have benefited as the survey is not excessive, is easily understood and results easily interpreted. In addition, they offer an extensive range of support tools for Managers in action planning. This is a game changer for any progressive CEO/MD and we'll continue to build on our client's experiences. This is a really good product in the marketplace for the SME sector and one we’re glad to be associated with.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use; accessible; easy to interpret; good results features; extensive support tools for managers;

reviews.review_title: Best employee engagement tool for SME
reviews.review_description: Can not fault the service or the product. I have a client who has used it for years and would be lost without the very valuable feedback from employees. In these difficult times, employee engagement is increasingly more important.
reviews.review_pros: I love the actions for each issue identified. It is easy to administer and interpret and the customer support is second to none. The team are always on hand to assist with queries and answer questions. The recent complimentary survey to identify the issues of homeworkers was particularly helpful.
reviews.review_cons: The results are limited to teams of 4, in some of my clients, there are not 4 people in each department. I understand, to anonymise the results, why it has to be this way. It is just something to be mindful of when setting the system up and reviewing the output.

reviews.review_title: Excellent Employee Engagement Tool
reviews.review_description: WeThrive have provided excellent support throughout at each stage of the process. Nothing is too much trouble and we are delighted to be partnering with WeThrive and offering their product to our clients.
reviews.review_pros: We love the fact that this software is very simple to use and not only gives the outcome of the survey in a simple, clear way, it also gives ongoing support to the Company in how to make improvements as a result of the feedback given.
reviews.review_cons: We did not have any difficulties in the use of the software nor in the feedback resulting from the survey and the presentation of the outcome.

reviews.review_title: Great tool for teams and individuals
reviews.review_pros: The wide range of aspects covered and clear reporting make this an easy to use and useful tool for managers and individuals to understand their own motivations and those of their colleagues to enable them to work more effectively together and focus on areas that are identified as needing attention.
reviews.review_cons: It is dependent on how people see and score themselves which needs to be taken into account when comparing the reports of different individuals.

reviews.review_title: Smooth implementation
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use and the support available to us throughout the projects.
reviews.review_cons: Worked very well for our needs so hard to suggest anything here.

reviews.review_title: A really great Employee Engagement Tool
reviews.review_description: WE have had a really poisive experience with we Thrive, return rates were high, feedback from staff about the survey was positive and it helped us to put together a plan to work on development areas. We are looking forward to re running the process again having benchmarked ourselves 3 months ago.
reviews.review_pros: We Thrive is an easy to use tool, which has enabled us to engage with staff, listen to their views but importantly helps you to follow up on their issues. We Thrive doesn't just give you the answers, it explains why people might be responding this this way and provides coaching suggestions to help you respond positively.
reviews.review_cons: A direct link from your desk top to the software would be better than trying to find the links and accessing via the browser.

reviews.review_title: We Thrive Employee Engagement
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: We are a one of We Thrive's partners and use the software to grow our business.
reviews.review_pros: The product is very straight forward and easy to use, the time element for the user is cut down and precise and to the point.
reviews.review_cons: There really wasn't anything I could fault.

reviews.review_title: Sets clear goals and actions. Very happy!
reviews.review_description: Very easy to use software and fantastic service, generating feedback that I have no doubt would not have been raised without this process. Using PRP I've been left with a clear set of actions and focus areas. I am very confident using this insight will lead to increased staff engagement, team motivation and ultimate business success - highly recommended!

reviews.review_title: The perfect diagnostic tool to find and deal with the source of a problem at work
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It is an excellent tool to find serious, but often intangible issues in a company. We use it to spot the the most pressing problems in terms of employee engagement so we can design and deliver the required solution. The best part is that this program can measure how efficient our solution was which is really important for HR managers.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use, modern look, excellent support.
reviews.review_cons: there is real potential to add more functions, however everything they have now is brilliant and they all work together seamlessly!

reviews.review_title: Lack of care for customers, dodgy auto-renewal tactics, clunky software
reviews.review_description: The tool sounded good, but there is no free trial, which should have raised alarm bells. For a performance management tool it is very clunky and rigid. It's not intuitive to run 1:1s, or create goals, and the feedback side is very basic. Notes on 1:1s are in a tiny text field with no formatting. If you make a mistake and finalise the agenda, even their support team can't change it. You can send out a pre-1:1 review to be filled in, but any new ones use a fixed set of default questions that you have to amend each time. Often, other users won't be able to see things they should be able to see and there is no way to update permissions without contacting support. I think they have shoe-horned performance management into their survey tool and it doesn't really work. When we cancelled our contract giving exactly 30 days notice (contract terms at least 30 days notice), they said we had missed the deadline and would have to pay for a full year. This was a shame, as I had thought the team behind the product at least cared about their customers but it appears not. Any business that attempts to force customers to use their product (and feels they need to do this) is obviously not confident in their product and is going to suffer more damage in terms of long-term reputation than any benefit they get from short-term revenue grabs from disgruntled customers.
reviews.review_pros: It has been our first performance management tool and it has enabled us to get the basics in place, even though it isn't easy to do anything on the platform.
reviews.review_cons: Attempted to make us pay for another 12 months when we tried to leave, saying we missed the notice of non-renewal date (which was incorrect). Then had the cheek to claim that we needed to pay for another 12 months of their service that we weren't using in order to protect their business and for them to invest in future products. Requests for exports of our data so far ignored.

reviews.review_title: Finally a tool that helps improve ALL essential aspects of employee experience
reviews.review_description: I love the fact that this one tool helps address and improve so many aspects of the employee experience, and that individuals (employees) can assess their own engagement and mental wellbeing at any time they want and get personalised action recommendations they can start taking immediately and independently. True empowerment!
reviews.review_pros: It is firmly based on human psychology and looks at the human fundamentals that really matter to productivity, performance, engagement, mental wellbeing and diversity & inclusion. It gives a foundation to a truly human centric company culture. One framework, one approach, one tool :) Not only does this tool help survey and assess what is potentially hindering positive employee experience but it also suggests simple, practical actions that managers and employees can start taking immediately and independently.
reviews.review_cons: I'd like to have an option to run the diversity, equality, equity and inclusion survey non-anonymously.

reviews.review_title: WeThrive Partner
reviews.review_description: We would strongly advocate that WeThrive is certainly a platform worth investing in if you are looking to improve engagement, productivity and drive ongoing development within your teams.
reviews.review_pros: We have chosen to Partner with WeThrive and offer this service as a bolt on to our own. We have found that our clients have really benefited from receiving instant insights via the surveys, allowing them to respond immediately and take action. We Thrive is also such a great tool for providing valuable learning content.
reviews.review_cons: We found all aspects of WeThrive to be excellent, from the Customer Service support to the Partner Portal, Content and more. We have found that it's vital to a workforce to have clarity on how their employees are really feeling, this enables them to be able to identify who needs support and in which areas.

reviews.review_title: Employee Engagment
reviews.review_description: Our overall experience with WeThrive has been exceptional from the initial conversations to activating the surveys and assisting with understanding the responses and feedback. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has produced excellent, informative Board Packs and always been available to answer questions and support with suggestions. I would highly recommend WeThrive to any business.
reviews.review_pros: The software is easy to use and provides detailed feedback to allow you to have meaningful conversations to support employees and develop business strategies.
reviews.review_cons: It would be useful if the software gave the option to download individual sheets detailing the feedback and suggested actions

reviews.review_title: Recommended
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I always hated performance reviews - giving and receiving them. Just uncomfortable, and struggling to know what to say or how to respond. This all changed with We Thrive - now we all actually enjoy them. It's a chance to express how you really feel, and you get some real insights into staff. It's all 'legitimised' within the very professional process and format of the App. So it eliminates any of the potential for confrontation and acrimony of traditional performance reviews A must-have for HR people, personnel development, team building and coaching - and any line manager
reviews.review_pros: Great value. Excellent for performance reviews, coaching etc
reviews.review_cons: We didn't need the customer support - so I can't comment on it.

reviews.review_title: Love the Honesty it brings to the table
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I think it's good for ground-up feedback and necessary for company change. If the company isn't ready to receive that kind of growth, it's not for them. This fits a lot of HR needs and would be useful for the company looking to improve their staff on multiple levels.
reviews.review_pros: The questions this software asks are direct and helps management know certain areas of improvement. We really liked that we could survey the teams and then also track things. We could word the surveys so that the teams needed to answer honestly. It is EXTREMELY easy to use.
reviews.review_cons: We didn't end up using it long enough for management to make great use of it and I wish we kept with it.

reviews.review_title: Performance Review Pro
reviews.review_description: A great independent, easy to use, unpolitical snapshot tool, allowing us to track staff moral and understanding of the business whilst also prompting interesting discussions. We know our staff are integral to our business; this tool helps to manage the team in a more scientific manner.
reviews.review_pros: Prompts in depth review of each member of staff and looks past the simple answers.
reviews.review_cons: Some staff commented on the ambiguous questions but understood the reasoning when explained.

reviews.review_title: Gave Really Good Direction for Further Focus
reviews.review_description: Too often, business leaders and managers have fairly scant information on which to work with their team and develop actionable objectives. Performance Review Pro acts as a shot of adrenaline to the relationship between employee and employer. It adds depth and dimension to insights into the employee's position that accelerates performance because it accelerates how the relationship can progress.

reviews.review_title: Provides useful insight across the team to better improve employee engagement
reviews.review_description: PRP gave valuable insight into how my staff were feeling across a number of business areas and gave me the tools to understand where improvements needed to be made. It provided an open forum for individuals to provide honest feedback and allowed me to discuss the results with them and understand how we can do better as a company to improve the engagement and overall welfare of all employees.

reviews.review_title: The best employee engagement survey tool
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: This employee engagement survey is uniquely helpful to an organisation striving to improve its relationship with its staff. Firstly the basic questionnaire is short and so likely to be filled in. Then it dynamically goes into extra detail on a subject when the employee's scores are low. The results it gives to managers are well presented, and it tops it off with detailled guidance that is given to managers on what to do about the results. This final part is a bit like an online coaching tool advising on how to approach the situation with the employee and suggestions on what is likely to enable a productive conversation.

reviews.review_title: Fantastic employee engagement software!
reviews.review_description: Great company to deal with and very helpful if I need advice.
reviews.review_pros: Very easy to use, nice design and provides clear detailed actions on what to do next.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing. It does everything I needed and more.

reviews.review_title: Just what I was looking for
reviews.review_description: As an employer who wants all his employees to enjoy their work as well as delivering to a high standard, I was looking for something that could help me better understand how they were feeling. I don't have a dedicated HR manager, so the responsibility for this task fell to me. WeThrive was easy to use and very easy to understand. I spoke to one of the guys who runs the company after completing my trial and I wanted to find out a lot more about what it meant. Was a fascinating chat and they were super helpful too. I know have a tool I can trust to keep me on the pulse of how my team are feeling and what i can do to help make their work experience as rewarding as possible.
